name: Soul
ability: Each night*, the possessed chooses what alive player is possessed by the Soul & "is the Demon". They are evil until they pass the Soul. [No Minions]
flavor: YUCK!! Why is it so slimy?! (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: The possessed chooses a player. :reminder: Give a thumbs-up. Put them to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* & Soul tokens & give a thumbs-down.
